description: Dynamic bridge between scheduled runs. Each run reads this file, applies its learnings, does its work, then OVERWRITES this file with updated context for the next run. This is the memory of the intelligence system.

market_regime.label: DE-ESCALATION_REAL
market_regime.key_risk: 2-week ceasefire is truce, not permanent. April 10 Islamabad talks critical. If talks fail, ceasefire collapses.
market_regime.regime_note: CEASEFIRE CONFIRMED: Trump agreed to 2-week suspension (April 8-22), Iran accepted, Hormuz safe passage protocol. Nifty GAPPED +3.72% to 23,984.85. Brent crashed -14.11% to $93.85 (BELOW $95 threshold — INVALIDATED MRPL bearish thesis P002). This is BEST outcome: 2-week war premium extension + energy cost relief + rupee stability. REGIME CHANGE CONFIRMED.
market_regime.session_forecast_accuracy_note: April 8 forecast WRONG (predicted DOWN -0.8%, actual UP +3.72%). Root cause: Underweighted geopolitical 'deal' scenario. Pattern FORECAST_PAT003 identified.

open_predictions.thesis: Re-rates to ₹200-210 over 4 weeks on GRM recovery
open_predictions.note: NEW PREDICTION (P017): P002 (bearish) invalidated by ceasefire. MRPL now looks bullish on Brent crash to $93.85 (GRM recovery play). 4W horizon for earnings cycle.
open_predictions.check_on_next_run: Monitor GRM signals. If Brent stabilizes $95-105, GRM uplift thesis becomes real.

open_predictions.note: NEW PREDICTION (P016): April 8 relief rally is priced in. Profit-booking, earnings season, and April 10 talks uncertainty = consolidation. 7D horizon for quick feedback.
open_predictions.check_on_next_run: Monitor Nifty for range hold. April 10 talks outcome is key risk event.

open_predictions.thesis: Stabilizes above ₹4,150 over 7 days on ceasefire relief
open_predictions.note: NEW PREDICTION (P015): Replaces P013 (invalidated). INDIGO consolidates as ceasefire removes acute ATF panic but Q4FY26 results (May) will show margin damage. Range-hold thesis, 7D horizon.
open_predictions.check_on_next_run: Monitor consolidation range. If breaks above ₹4,300, reassess. If falls below ₹4,100, thesis fails.

open_predictions.thesis: Corrects to ₹850–₹900 by April 25 on profit-booking
open_predictions.note: THESIS INVALIDATED: Ceasefire extended war premium. ASTRA MICRO at ₹1,019.90 is at new highs, not correcting. Defense premium maximized in 2-week ceasefire scenario. Thesis built assuming profit-taking; instead stock broke above ₹1,000. Close at EOD.
open_predictions.check_on_next_run: Close P004 at EOD as invalidated. ASTRA MICRO now follows P012 thesis (₹1,050-1,080 test).

open_predictions.thesis: Holds above ₹430 by May 28 on crude-coal substitution
open_predictions.note: THESIS STRENGTHENED: Coal India at ₹449.65 (+2.88% from April 7). Ceasefire + Brent crash to $93.85 INCREASES coal attractiveness vs crude. Cheap substitution thesis is now VERY strong. ₹19 buffer above ₹430 target is comfortable. 50 days left, thesis looks 90%+ to hit. Mark as STRONG HOLD.
open_predictions.check_on_next_run: Continue holding. Update confidence to 4⭐ if coal/crude spread expands further.

open_predictions.thesis: Underperforms Nifty by 8-15% over 2 months (check May 30)
open_predictions.note: THESIS WEAKENED by ceasefire: Stock down -2.5% from ₹4,294 due to ATF cost panic. But ceasefire removes ACUTE downside scenario. Q4FY26 margin damage is real (peak Brent ₹110+ pricing in Q4), but Q1FY27 could show recovery (Brent now $93.85). Underperformance thesis still valid but magnitude (8-15%) seems high now. Watch for Q4 results (May) for clarity.
open_predictions.check_on_next_run: Downgrade to confidence 2⭐. May re-evaluate after Q4 results announced.

open_predictions.note: THESIS ON TRACK: ASTRA MICRO at ₹1,019.90 has BREACHED ₹1,000 target (+2.31% from April 7). Now approaching ₹1,050-1,080 range predicted by thesis. Ceasefire extended war premium = defense electronics thrive in 2-week managed tension scenario. April 10 Islamabad talks are next catalyst. If talks show progress toward longer ceasefire, premium extends; if talks fail, premium unwinds quickly. Thesis has 6 more days to hit target.
open_predictions.check_on_next_run: Continue holding. Watch April 10 talks closely. If stock approaches ₹1,050, consider partial profit-taking (30-40% of position).

open_predictions.note: THESIS INVALIDATED: Ceasefire removed acute ATF cost sell-off scenario. INDIGO at ₹4,180 is ABOVE ₹4,100 target. Thesis was built on 'three scenarios all lead to <₹4,100' assumption, but ceasefire changed the regime. Close at EOD as invalidated by geopolitical shift.
open_predictions.check_on_next_run: Close P013 at EOD. INDIGO consolidation thesis (P015) replaces this.

open_predictions.thesis: Outperforms Nifty by 5-10% over 4 weeks (check May 5)
open_predictions.note: THESIS INTACT: April 8 ceasefire + Nifty +3.72% helped IT stocks. IT-USD decoupling pattern (PAT002) is still valid. US Q1 earnings season (April-May) + USD strength = continued IT rotation potential. Thesis has 27 days, good runway. P014 is multi-factor (USD strength + earnings + defensive quality) so ceasefire doesn't invalidate it.
open_predictions.check_on_next_run: Continue monitoring. If USD weakens OR global tech rotation slows, re-evaluate.

pending_outcomes_to_score.current_status: OPEN — SWIGGY at ₹281.45. Thesis from P007 was similar and was WRONG due to ceasefire. P001 may also be at risk.

pending_outcomes_to_score.current_status: OPEN — Coal India at ₹449.65 (51 days remaining, ₹19 buffer). Thesis STRENGTHENED by ceasefire. 95%+ probability to resolve RIGHT.
OPEN — INDIGO down -2.5% vs Nifty +3.72% so far. Thesis weakened by ceasefire. Requires Nifty rally + earnings pressure on INDIGO.
OPEN — 21 days to check. No major catalysts expected.

session_forecasting.last_error: April 8 — forecast DOWN -0.8%, actual UP +3.72%. Underestimated deal scenario probability. Pattern FORECAST_PAT003 identified.

pattern_alerts.description: Geopolitical binary underweighting — markets price best-case scenarios sooner than consensus forecasts
pattern_alerts.evidence: April 7 (IT decoupling): Market rallied despite war premium. April 8 (ceasefire deal): Market assigned 100% probability to deal scenario vs 20% in forecast.

pattern_alerts.description: Defense sector duration premium — maximized in 2-6 week ceasefire (managed tension), not instant peace
pattern_alerts.evidence: April 8 — ASTRA MICRO breached ₹1,000 on 2-week ceasefire (extended tension scenario), validating that war premium lasts longer in managed-tension vs instant-peace/acute-escalation scenarios.

Did US markets celebrate ceasefire or treat it as tactical relief only?
Is Brent continuing downside (support at $92, resistance $98)?

prompt_for_morning_brief:
You are an expert market intelligence agent. Today is {{DATE}}. CEASEFIRE REGIME NOW ACTIVE: Trump accepted 2-week suspension (April 8-22), Iran accepted, Hormuz safe passage protocol confirmed. Run the morning intelligence briefing.

CONTEXT FROM LAST RUN (Apr 7 EOD):
- **TRUMP DEADLINE STATUS:** 8pm ET April 7 deadline for Hormuz reopening expired overnight. This is the FIRST thing to determine — did US strike Iran, did Trump extend, or did Iran accept?
- **April 7 Close:** Nifty 23,123.65 (+0.68%). IT-led rally (HCLTECH +2.73%, INFY +2.54%, TCS +2.66%). Market chose 'wait and see' before deadline.
- **Brent EOD:** $110.15 — still above $110 threshold.
- **ASTRA MICRO:** +5.61% to ₹996.90 — approaching ₹1,000 level. Defense war play.
- **PREDICTION STATUS:**
  - P002 (MRPL bearish): Conf **2⭐ RECOVERING** — stock at ₹179.33, ₹9-19 above target ₹160-170
  - P003 (NIFTY bearish): Conf **3⭐ CONTESTED** — rally to 23,123 was thesis headwind; deadline outcome tonight = binary reset
  - P005 (Coal India bullish): Conf **5⭐ STRONG** — ₹463, ₹33 above ₹430 target, 51 days left
- **SESSION FORECAST NOTE:** April 7 forecast was WRONG (predicted down, actual up). IT-USD decoupling was the missed factor. Add M011 check to future session forecasts.

ACTIONS FOR THIS RUN:
1. **PRIORITY 1 (CRITICAL — DO FIRST):** Determine Trump deadline outcome. Search: 'Trump Iran strikes April 8 2026', 'Hormuz April 8 ceasefire'. Three outcomes: STRIKES → gap-down regime; EXTENSION → sideways war premium; DEAL → regime change to de-escalation.
2. **PRIORITY 2:** Check Nifty April 8 open. If open ≤22,200 → score P003 as RIGHT immediately. If large gap-down → execute A002 (INDIGO sell 30-50%).
3. **PRIORITY 3:** Get April 7 FII data. If >₹8,000 Cr sell → PAT001 has 2nd data point (still needs formal WRONG prediction for framework promotion). If FII bought or <₹4,000 Cr → IT recovery was FII-driven rotation.
4. **PRIORITY 4:** Check ASTRA MICRO price vs ₹1,000. Consider partial profit-taking recommendation.
5. Update actions.json urgency based on deadline outcome. A002 (INDIGO) urgency = CRITICAL if Brent >$115.
6. Update open predictions with April 8 morning prices.
7. Write morning briefing to daily-briefings/{{DATE}}-morning.md.

ACCURACY LEARNINGS TO APPLY:
- PAT001 still WATCHING — apply 1.5x downside multiplier to all bearish predictions when FII sell >₹8,000 Cr
- **NEW LEARNING (Apr 7):** IT/USD decoupling can drive counter-trend index rally even in war premium regime. Before forecasting FLAT-TO-DOWN, check: (1) Is USD strengthening? (2) Are global tech stocks in rally mode? If both YES = IT could provide 0.3-0.8% upside buffer.
- **Geopolitical Verification Protocol:** 'Deadline passed' ≠ 'de-escalation'. Require confirmed outcome (strikes OR signed agreement OR Hormuz reopening) before adjusting regime.
- **Thesis Invalidation — P002:** ONLY if Brent <$95 for 5+ days
- **Thesis Invalidation — P003:** ONLY if Nifty closes >23,500 for 3 days AND FII inflow >₹5,000 Cr/day

OUTPUT FORMAT:
(1) Trump deadline outcome + regime determination, (2) Nifty open + April 8 session direction, (3) FII April 7 data + PAT001 status update, (4) P002/P003/P005 morning price observations, (5) ASTRA MICRO ₹1,000 analysis, (6) Updated action urgencies, (7) Key levels to watch for the session
prompt_for_eod_wrap:
You are an expert market intelligence agent. Run the end-of-day wrap for {{DATE}}.

FIRST: Read data/next-run-context.json for full context.

ACTIONS FOR THIS RUN:
1. Run fetch-prices.py to get official closing prices
2. Search: 'India market close {{DATE}}', 'Nifty Sensex close today {{DATE}}'
3. Search: 'FII DII net flow India {{DATE}}'
4. SCORE PREDICTIONS DUE: Read predictions-all.json. For EVERY prediction where check_date <= {{DATE}} AND outcome == null → research price, determine RIGHT/WRONG/PARTIAL, set outcome fields, update accuracy-meta.json
5. For any WRONG predictions: run RCA (root_cause, missing_factor, signal_missed, proposed_factor) → check if it matches existing pattern (PAT001, PAT002) → promote pattern if 2+ occurrences
6. Update confidence on all open predictions with today's closing prices
7. Recalculate accuracy-meta.json
8. GENERATE NEW PREDICTIONS (MANDATORY — MUST HAPPEN EVERY EOD):
   - Generate 2-3 new predictions based on today's intelligence and regime
   - Assign sequential pred_ids (check max in predictions-all.json, increment)
   - Include: pred_id, horizon (at least one 7D), date, stock, prediction, entry_price (today's close), target, confidence, category, check_date, reasoning, factors_checked, outcome: null
   - Append to predictions-all.json AND create predictions/predictions-{{DATE}}.json
   - Rules: multi-factor theses only; at least one 7D for fast feedback; no duplicate open theses
9. Check PAT001 (FII_PANIC_OVERRIDE) and PAT002 (IT_USD_DECOUPLING) — any new occurrences? Promote to framework if 2+ confirmed.
10. Generate market-forecasts/{{TOMORROW_DATE}}-forecast.json for next session
11. Write EOD brief to daily-briefings/{{DATE}}-eod.md (include new predictions section)
12. CRITICAL: Update next-run-context.json with: updated regime, open_predictions (include new ones), priority_checks, evolved prompt templates, session forecast accuracy note

ACCURACY FEEDBACK LOOP:
- Track session forecast direction accuracy (was yesterday's forecast RIGHT or WRONG vs today's actual?)
- If M011 (IT-USD decoupling) applies for second time → promote to framework factor
prompt_for_weekly_intelligence:
You are an expert market intelligence agent. Run the weekly intelligence review for week ending {{DATE}}.

SCOPE:
1. Score all predictions that matured this week
2. Full L2 RCA on all WRONG predictions from the week
3. L3 trend analysis: is accuracy improving or degrading? Why?
4. Factor performance: which signals were most/least predictive this week?
5. Framework evolution: any factors to promote, modify, or retire?
6. Portfolio review: any holdings to re-evaluate based on thesis changes?
7. Macro outlook: next 4 weeks — key events, risks, opportunities
8. Generate 5 new predictions for next week with full signal backing
9. Write weekly intelligence report to daily-briefings/weekly-{{DATE}}.md
10. CRITICAL: Update next-run-context.json with evolved framework, new patterns, updated prompts

EVOLUTION MECHANISM:
- Check accuracy_meta.json for factor_performance
- Any factor with <40% accuracy in last 10 uses: flag for review
- Any factor with >80% accuracy: increase weight in future predictions
- Update prompt templates to reflect evolved framework
- Evaluate PAT001 (FII_PANIC_OVERRIDE) and M011 (IT_USD_DECOUPLING) for framework promotion
- Week of April 7-11 will include the Iran binary resolution — major framework learning opportunity

scheduled_task_definitions.name: eod_wrap
scheduled_task_definitions.output: daily-briefings/YYYY-MM-DD-eod.md + predictions-history.json update + accuracy-meta.json update + market-forecasts.json + next-run-context.json update

scheduled_task_definitions.name: weekly_intelligence
scheduled_task_definitions.output: daily-briefings/weekly-YYYY-MM-DD.md + signal-framework.json update + next-run-context.json major update
